brief: Regenerate the selected Old Mac-inspired portfolio logo without the central black dot.
deterministic_layers: Review manifest and shared review board
constraints: Preserve the Old Mac-style computer body
No letters, numbers, symbols, fake brand marks, or watermarks
Optimize for portfolio hero/logo mark use

visual_qa.production_risk: The generated edit slightly redraws surface details, so use as a raster asset unless later converted/rebuilt deterministically.

recommended_next_step: Use this as the selected no-dot raster logo, or ask for a deterministic cleanup/export pass before integrating it into the website.
